sensors.title: Select Sensors
sensors.description: Found {count} sensors. Select the ones you want to monitor.

access_mode.title: Access Mode
access_mode.description: Enable write mode to control heater parameters from Home Assistant. WARNING: Incorrect values could affect heater operation. Only enable if you understand the risks.

parameters.title: Select Parameters
parameters.description: Found {count} basic parameters ({hidden} expert parameters available). For safety, none are selected by default.

data.show_expert: I also want to configure expert parameters

show_expert.title: Expert Parameters
show_expert.description: Found {count} expert parameters. These are internal heater settings — change with caution.

progress.discover_sensors: Connecting to the heater and reading all available sensors with their current values. This may take up to 60 seconds...
progress.discover_params: Reading the heater's menu tree to find writable parameters. This may take about 30 seconds...

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the heater. Check your connection settings and cables.
error.no_sensors: Connected successfully but no sensors were found.

abort.discover_failed: Sensor discovery failed. Check the connection and try again.

init.title: Fröling Heater Options
init.description: Adjust polling interval and sensor selection.
